statement: All work complete — structured completion report required
reasoning: All 6 DAG nodes completed: brief-cache (convention cache), brief-slice (backward cone walk), enrich-getbrief (150-char truncation replaced with full slice), wire-advance-cache (cache write on advance), spec-context-at-make (spec inputs as ambient), test-brief-enrichment (15/15 tests pass). TypeScript compiles clean throughout. All produces committed.
promptAnswers:
COMPLETION REPORT:

1. COMMIT STATUS:
- src/lib/brief-cache.ts: afbb487 (brief-cache node)
- src/lib/brief-slice.ts: 5fdd0e2 (brief-slice node)
- src/lib/brief.ts: 57b8983 (enrich-getbrief node)
- bin/roadmap.ts: 5fdd0e2 (wire-advance-cache + spec-context-at-make)
- test/brief-enrichment.test.ts: 8292fb4 (test node)
All produces committed on feat/brief-enrichment branch.

2. TEST EVIDENCE:
15 tests pass in test/brief-enrichment.test.ts:
- writeNodeCache: bounded output, convention detection, no-code-file handling
- readNodeCache: null for uncached
- briefSlice: full description, ambient files, distance contraction, depth-1 vs depth-2+, node contract, topology
- getBrief: no truncation, specContext, topology, codeContext with ancestors, backward compat
Untested: cache write failure path in advance (non-blocking catch), very large files hitting budget truncation, DAGs with >4 depth levels.

3. UNVALIDATED ASSUMPTIONS:
- The globally installed roadmap binary resolves to a different path than the dev copy. Tests use local imports so this doesn't affect test correctness, but users running the global binary won't see enriched briefs until re-linked.
- Convention detection (import/export/naming) uses regex, not AST. Edge cases with complex syntax may mis-detect.

4. FAILURE SURFACE:
- briefSlice on a DAG with cycles would infinite-loop in walkBackwardCone. Mitigated by visited set, but untested.
- writeNodeCache with very large produced files could exceed budget despite truncation. The truncation cuts by file count, not by content size within a file. Weakest node: brief-cache, failure mode: headLines from a 10K-line file with no exports.

5. SCOPE DECISIONS:
- No LLM in the loop for convention extraction — pure regex/heuristic. Intentional: keeps advance fast and deterministic.
- No forward cone (descendant expectations) in this phase. Identified as valuable but lower leverage than backward cone.
- No convergence loop or style validator. Brief enrichment only — preventive, not corrective.
- Convention detection limited to 3 signals (import/export/naming). Extensible but intentionally minimal.

6. AUDIT TRAIL:
- .roadmap/specs/brief-enrichment.spec.json: source spec
- .roadmap/head.json: DAG with 6 nodes
- .roadmap/completed.json: advance evidence for all nodes
- test/brief-enrichment.test.ts: 15 automated tests
- git log feat/brief-enrichment: 5 commits with per-node attribution
